heading: building our village in the city
intro: fractalgva is our neighborhood project in geneva's eaux-vives. we are motivating our favorite people to move within walking distance to serendipitously generate scenius. friends move closer, events self-organize, and the city starts to feel like a durable home base.
detail: previously, i dropped out of uni and rebuilt effective altruism switzerland. the strategy here is the same: identify the ambitious outliers, facilitate encounters, and watch what happens.

programs.title: fractal university
programs.desc: peer-taught courses on things we care about -- civic engagement, improv theater, claude code, life satisfaction, bike building, poetry writing, lino printing, child-rearing, documentary making, mandarin, meditating, drawing, climbing.

programs.title: regular events
programs.desc: meetups, dinners, workshops. many are private. reach out if you'd like to know more.

programs.title: occasional retreats
programs.desc: talks, adventures, hackathons and the conversations and connections that only happen when you take people out of their routines for a sustained period of time.
